rationale: All four AC items satisfied: verbose mode enriches llm.response (content, finish_reason, full usage with cache fields) and tool.call (input, output, duration_ms, error); schema documented in session_log_format.go; lean default preserved and asserted by test; verbose fixture verifies every required field.

findings.summary: Verbose tool.call deferral is a behavior change beyond strictly additive (acknowledged in doc comment); consumers tolerant of extra fields are unaffected.
llm.request event is documented in the schema but not actually emitted in this diff; bead's 'new event' was a 'possibly' suggestion, so not strictly required by AC.
